llm_instruction: Use this small file for country-and-function-specific matching. Copy job URLs exactly. Never construct basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Import-Export Customs Operations Internship
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: The internship program is available all year long and here's what you can expect • A rewarding internship journey with tasks and projects that enable you to transfer your theoretical skills to a real business environment and gain exposure to diverse parts of the function e.g. supply chain, logistics, order management, etc. • You will be able to explore digital technologies such as robotics and automation, machine learning, predictive analytics, AI technologies with potential to improve operational effectiveness and efficiency • Collaborative and multicultural atmosphere where you are an essential team player to support colleagues and managers in a wide range projects and activities • Guidance, coaching and feedback from supervisors on performance which help you learn and shape your working style About The Role • Support in tracking shipment schedules and updating details in SAP. • Learn end to end shipment processes, Incoterms. to end shipment and customs operations. • Collect and verify key shipping documents and uploading using Power Automate. • Support in delivering automation effort across teams to simplify work processes • Participate in improvement initiatives discussion to w

jobs.title: Intern, Customs Operation
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: The main objective of this internship program is to provide students with comprehensive exposure to customs operations within the supply chain, specifically for the chemistry industry. Interns will gain practical understanding of customs-related topics, including HS code classification, analyzing the impact of duties and taxes in international trade, and exploring trade facilities such as free trade agreements, Authorised Economic Operator (AEO), duty drawback etc. Interning with the customs operation team offers valuable insights into international business practices and supply chain dynamics. This experience equips interns with specialized skills that are highly sought after in global trade and logistics, fostering professional growth and enhancing future career opportunities. Learn the basics of customs operations and their critical role in the supply chain. Study foundational customs knowledge and terminology relevant to the chemistry industry. Observe and map out the overview process flow of customs procedures. Understand HS code classification and its importance for accurate documentation and tax calculation. Explore the effects of duties and taxes on international business t

jobs.title: Transport Management (Executive)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: O bjectives of the Position: Responsible for ensuring transport management for inbound or outbound (as assigned) are as per stipulated guidelines, procedures and requirements Support process improvement, knowledge and risk management as per overseas delivery services M ain Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities: Outbound Processing transports for packaged deliveries with a focus on sea freight to our customers in compliance with the required customer deadlines at cost-optimal conditions Managing the loading planning consolidation/deconsolidation activities at the associated companies and external locations or sites, including monitoring of loading times. Legal, internal, safety-relevant and packaging-related regulations must be considered, and customer-specific service levels and other quality requirements must be met Monitoring of all necessary or relevant shipment milestones and ensuring prompt follow ups, updates and correspondences to all relevant stakeholders. Monitoring and assessing the quality of our service providers, transport reliability and feedback rates and tracking shipments vessels Preparation of all necessary transport documents, control of the proper filing

jobs.title: Senior Officer, Order to Cash (Japanese Speaker)
jobs.company: BASF (Malaysia) Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position The primary function of this role is to provide efficient order management, manage interfaces with customers for order to cash processes and provide improvements to supply chain management. Effectively communicate and resolve order issues with customers and sales. Responsibility of placing replenishment purchase order to supply source and monitor the delivery schedule Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Manage Master Data maintenance process to ensure effective order management and the End-to-End order process by proactively collaborating with multiple functions. Capture market intelligence on the supply chain related topics from daily interaction with customers and share with the business as appropriate and be an integral part of business management. Contribute to development of customer relationships through proactive customer communication related to order management e.g. product availability, order status and delivery tracking. Support Credit Management, Billing and Accounts Receivable Follow-up. Issuing tax invoices for month end closing. Handle customer complaints in BASF’s available system (Non-Conformance Management, tNPS) and active

jobs.title: Senior Officer, Supply Chain Planner (12 months leasing contract)
jobs.company: BASF (Malaysia) Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position Manage the complete planning role which includes Demand Supply planning Support in Merchandise stock planning for ASEAN Assist in Raw Material Planning Responsibilities Develop and execute demand and supply planning strategies to ensure optimal inventory levels and timely fulfilment of business requirements. Collaborate closely with sales, procurement, and logistics teams to align demand forecasts with supply capabilities. Monitor market trends and historical data to create accurate demand forecasts and mitigate potential supply chain disruptions. Balance demand forecast against supply capability and inventory to create a feasible constrained rough-cut supply plan for Merchandise Products. Assist in raw material planning by coordinating with suppliers and production teams to ensure timely availability of materials. Maintain comprehensive records and reports on inventory, demand forecasts, and supply schedules for effective decision-making. Identify process improvement opportunities within planning functions to enhance efficiency. Participate in cross-functional meetings and projects, contributing insights for continuous improvement of planning processes.

jobs.title: Import & Export Operations MY (Executive)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position: Ensure effective execution of inbound and outbound transportation (Import Export) including documentation and system (SAP TM) processes Maintain accurate reporting, cost control, and compliance with company and regulatory requirements Drive timely issue resolution, escalation, and continuous improvement across logistics operations Support monitoring of service provider performance against defined KPIs Main Tasks: 1. Operations Management Manage end-to-end Import Export shipment processes (Air, LCL, FCL, ISO, tanker, parcel tanker) Coordinate shipment arrangements with LLP, LSP, warehouse, PPC, and stakeholders Prepare and validate shipping documentation and ensure proper system updates (SAP TM) Handle MDB block release and shipment readiness validation Troubleshoot system or operational issues impacting shipment execution 2. Reporting Analytics Prepare and manage operational reports including: LLP Rework Report LCL/Air KPI Report TCO Report Demurrage Detention Report Freight Cost Clean-up (weekly monthly) FCV bi-weekly updates Validate data with LLP/LSP and ensure submission within defined timelines Analyze deviations and drive corrective actions 3. Cost

jobs.title: Assistant Manager, Production Planning
jobs.company: BASF (Malaysia) Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position To support daily Supply Network Planning operations for the Engineering Plastics in Pasir Gudang plant. Ensuring timely raw material availability, accurate production planning, system maintenance, compliance with audit requirements, and preparation of monthly reports. Main Tasks Issue a monthly production schedule to determine the production volume to be produced on each extruder line every month. Received MPS from SCM Regional to prepare detailed production scheduling on monthly basis. Assist in data processing of all production information after each run, according to BASF procedures, and keying them into the SAP system (GR/GI) Assist in issuing the feed preparation information as per the official recipe to the Production Supervisor for each production run in both SAP and MES barcode. Responsible for aging stocks control for raw materials Liaise closely with SCM, and A-PMA on all changes and arrangements of production, stock, and schedule accordingly. Responsible for new Material Master request in Bizagi for 3rd party raw material. If Finish Goods only for the change of packaging type. Requirements Minimum of Diploma in Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry,

jobs.title: Export Management (Executive)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position Responsible for ensuring export management are as per stipulated guidelines, procedures and requirements. Support process improvement, knowledge and risk management as per overseas delivery services. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Processing monitoring of customer orders for exports from different business units in compliance with legal, country or customer regulations Fulfillment of customer-specific service agreements and order-related requirements Responsibility for orders in line with the door-to-door accountability concept and monitoring of delivery reliability Collaborate with Transport Managers, forwarders, Export Managers, and other stakeholders to resolve documentation discrepancies and ensure smooth, timely shipment execution Prepare, validate, and monitor export related documents (e.g., BL/SWB, COO, COA, MSDS, packing list) in line with regulatory and operational guidelines Support issue resolution by troubleshooting export order discrepancies and working with cross functional teams to prevent delays Execute assigned export management transactions in SAP, ensuring correct data flow and documentation availability Coordinate im

jobs.title: Import Export Asia Pacific (Executive) - Japanese Speaker
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position Managing and maintenance of all inbound and outbound Transportation management and documentation processes in support of assigned countries Archiving of all applicable documentation in accordance to company and regulatory guidelines Proactively escalate cases of deviations in transportation activities to bring shipment back on track in meeting defined and agreed delivery dates Meet defined service levels and any agreed qualitative requirements pertaining core transportation and documentation scope of work Support monitoring and evaluation of service provider’s performance referring to agreed KPIs and conduct periodic quality reviews Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Responsible on logistics fulfilment processes (including SAP TM maintenance and process adherence) for all import and export shipments by working closely with country import export team and hub-based overseas delivery services community Monitor, analyze, and manage operational issues where possible, and escalate to the appropriate country team, import/export stakeholders, or Team Lead for resolution and process improvement. jobs.title: Supply Chain Modeling & Optimization Specialist
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position Digitalization will be part of our DNA at GB. We will change processes that will simplify life within but also outside of GB, sometimes even without our BASF colleagues noticing it. Within GB, we will use digital tools to stop us spending too much time on tasks that hinder us from doing the things that are really needed, such as consulting our service recipients. Digital tools will free up our time to help our internal partners and we will be able to actively shape our division’s digital footprint. GB Strategy is to transform Kuala Lumpur Hub into a digital Hub to support BASF. GBC Supply chain team is looking for an exceptional Supply chain professional to support in development and implementation of new digital tools that will help operations. You will focus on designing and implementing (along with counterparts and solution architects) Control Tower solutions for BASF Overseas delivery services. In addition, you will need to understand the customers' requirements and use cases to map to the Control Tower solution. As part of the digital transformation, you will play a key role in change management and communication to stakeholders. Main Areas of Respon

jobs.title: Order Management (Executive)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position The Executive, Order Management, will execute the customer order management processes with a consistent high level of service across ASEAN, Australia and New Zealand (ANZ), Taiwan for the Customer Service which is still with Global Business. Main Tasks Operations and Performance Execute the Customer Order Management processes set up in KL Hub with the different models interfaces Processing of sales and purchase orders from various customers in a timely manner Service contact for assigned countries – monitor order status and provide update information to the countries and customers Bill of Lading draft checking (for Letter of Credit orders, 3rd party supplier orders and key customer orders) Manage Insurance Certificate (if necessary) Follow up Bill of Lading receipt status based on Estimate Time of Delivery Collection of Original Bill of Lading and other documents from goods suppliers Provide full and accurate required documents to customers Upload / maintain documents in SAP for audit trail Support documents for internal and external audit purpose Register all and follow-up with all non-conformances in the NCM system to ensure a quick and efficient custom

jobs.title: Supply Planner - Regional SCM (12 months leasing contract)
jobs.company: BASF (Malaysia) Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: O bjectives of the Position Act as the key interface between formulation and refilling/repacking planner, Supply Chain Operations (platform), tollers and supplier (formulants and packaging) Schedule formulation and/or filling packaging at tollers and deliveries of locally sourced materials from suppliers Ensure Bill of Material (BOM) are up to date, artwork and packaging instructions are complied Generate and review Toller and Supplier Performance reports Perform Order management of products produced at tollers in line with Procurement Guideline Responsibilities Supply Planning Execution: Liaise with tollers to agree on a daily production plan based on rough cut plan and schedule deliveries of locally sourced materials (formulants and/or packaging) for the next 6 months Liaise with tollers and supplies of locally sourced materials (formulants and/or packaging) on daily basis to ensure production execution and delivery of locally sourced materials are in line with daily production plan Liaise with tollers and GS teams to schedule and execute deliveries and dispatch of products (produced at tollers to customers Raise Purchase Requisition (PR) and/or Purchase Order (PO) in line with 4

jobs.title: Import Export & Customs Ops Asia Pacific (Senior Executive)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: O bjectives of the Position Drive efficient Import, Export, and Customs operations across the region by improving processes, standardizing workflows, and ensuring compliance with global, regional, and local regulations. Lead Projects relevant to IE and customs operations, ensuring process adherence, operational excellence, and continuous learning and development. Collaborate with cross-functional teams—including Country IE Customs Ops, Regional Customs Foreign Trade, Order Management, GBS, Finance, Procurement, and Business Units—to ensure full compliance with corporate and regulatory requirements. Oversee LLP LSP daily operations, track vendor performance against KPIs, manage escalations, drive continuous improvement with country teams, and lead improvement efforts to strengthen overall Supply Chain operations. Support business units by enhancing service efficiency and implementing improvement initiatives to boost service quality and process effectiveness. Foster a culture of service excellence with service providers, focusing on customer-centric Import/Export, Customs Foreign Trade operations, and strict regulatory compliance. jobs.description: Objectives of the Position This position aims to provide end-to-end delivery services by efficiently handling customer service and logistics management to maintain business continuity, enhance service level and safety continuity in business. jobs.title: Supply Chain Operational Design (Specialist) - Data Analytics
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position Design and optimize GB services (based on BU demands, legal requirements, M A, investments, strategic projects etc.) Conduct feasibility, impact and cost analysis of prospective new services in SC Service environment Identify any needs for optimization/process changes and lead the implementation drive Ensuring that all service models and service solution designs conform to strategic, architectural, governance and other corporate requirements. Main Tasks Identify required models, methods and tools for Service Design Structure, group and prioritizing business requirements Ensure usage of new information and communication technology to design or re-design supply chain services Evaluate options, make comparative studies and recommend appropriate approaches/models Develop new and extend existing services based on requirements from the business and align with service catalog Test new services prior to implementation Calculate cost of new service Deliver basis for technical concept in cooperation with Functional Experts Drive automation and digitalization of GB services e.g. paperless document flows Drive integration of new businesses into GB service structure e

jobs.title: Trade Compliance Manager - Chemicals Trade Control
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position Global Cluster Lead: Own BASF Group’s Standard for Trade Compliance in the area of Chemicals Trade Control Global Topic Owner: Develop keep updated compliance concepts for your Topic(s), including necessary instruments to ensure business transactions are Compliant, documented and audit-ready. Main Tasks Global Cluster Lead Chemicals Trade Control Finalize and keep updated the Corporate Requirement on “Chemicals Trade Control” for BASF SE and all BASF Group companies Develop and maintain a roadmap for your cluster according to political context, including risk analysis for BASF group Actively act as a radar function, scanning for potential new trade restrictions in scope of your cluster* Collaborate with other cluster leads/ global topic owners on cross-cluster topics, defining guardrails and prerequisites for compliance Main liaison for internal stakeholders on Chemicals Trade Control, e.g. CLC/TC, Regional Trade Compliance teams, National Trade Compliance Officers (NTCOs), Business unit colleagues Coordinate Global Topic Owners within your cluster to optimize resources, avoid duplication maximize output. jobs.title: Import Export Asia Pacific (Executive)
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position Provide end-to-end operational support for import and export shipments across APAC, ensuring on-time execution, documentation accuracy, and compliance with global trade regulations. Act as the coordination hub between suppliers, logistics service providers , Business Units, and customs brokers to deliver reliable, compliant, and cost-effective shipping operations. jobs.title: Intern, Global Operations Support
jobs.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: O bjectives of the Position We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented intern to join our Global Operations Support department, supporting Maritime activities for EMEA Region. M ain Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Assist with administrative tasks to support the operations team Where needed, support certain units with daily troubleshooting tasks Generate reports to provide insights and support decision-making. Prepare documentation to support operational processes. Coordinate meetings, including scheduling, preparing agendas, and taking minutes. Manage and track pending operational tasks to ensure timely communication Job Requirements Currently pursuing Bachelors’ Degree in Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Business Administration, Business Information System, Information Technology or any related disciplines. Strong organizational and time management skills. Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint). Ability to work independently and as part of a team. Attention to detail and a proactive approach to problem-solving Good command of written and spoken English is necessity.

jobs.title: Assistant Manager, Order Management Delivery
jobs.company: BASF (Malaysia) Sdn. Bhd.
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position This position aims to provide end-to-end delivery services by efficiently handling customer service and logistics management to maintain business continuity, enhance service level and safety continuity in south of China on acrylate business. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities OTC Delivery Plan Coordinator Lead regular meetings with sites and planners for delivery plan drafting. Develop and continuously optimize daily delivery plans to ensure on-time fulfillment of customer demand and maintain service reliability. Lead real-time adjustments to delivery plans in response to operational constraints ensuring minimal disruption. Collaborate with Sales teams to manage allocation priorities during supply issues. Serve as the central communication point with OTC, ensuring timely updates and alignment on revised delivery plans. Drive key strategic digital projects to enhance process efficiency and compliance. Dynamic business OTC Expert Streamline complex business scenarios into workable OTC process. Dynamic business OTC backup. Cross-functional Communication Act as a key liaison among Master/Finite Planners, Sales, OTC, Site Logistics, and Logistic
